faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Lawrence, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Lawrence residents commonly encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly prevalent due to the area's mature trees and older wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species infesting your property to apply the most effective treatment methods.
